items.name_en: 🆕 Chip Version M60143 Khaki. Crafted from luxurious Mahina leather, this Iris wallet is an exquisite and charming accessory. It features soft calfskin with perforated Monogram pattern and a discreet snap closure.

items.name_cn:
🆕 M83505
A "Zippy Wallet" with embossed and printed Monogram pattern on a fluffy lambskin. Cut in feminine tones and finished with a gold zipper. Multiple compartments, pockets, and card slots to hold essentials like bills and coins, making it a functional wallet for daily use.
Size: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:
🆕 M83505
A "Zippy Wallet" with embossed and printed Monogram pattern on a fluffy lambskin. Cut in feminine tones and finished with a gold zipper. Multiple compartments, pockets, and card slots to hold essentials like bills and coins, making it a functional wallet for daily use.
Size: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

items.name_cn:
🆕 M83500
Single zipper wallet series Zippy coin Perth wallet. Gpi Coin Perth coordinated with the Monoglam theme of the leather goods collection this season. Special coating creates a bold, metallic effect on cotton and Lurex jacquard canvas. Space-efficient compact design. Secure full-zip closure. Various pockets and card slots.

specs.rawTitle:
🆕 M83500
Single zipper wallet series Zippy coin Perth wallet. Gpi Coin Perth coordinated with the Monoglam theme of the leather goods collection this season. Special coating creates a bold, metallic effect on cotton and Lurex jacquard canvas. Space-efficient compact design. Secure full-zip closure. Various pockets and card slots.

items.name_en: 🆕 【 M83226 White Flower 】 This Zippy coin wallet features the iconic Monogram canvas, known for its compact and small size that fits easily into pockets or small bags, while providing everyday functions. Engraved zipper ensures security, and the wide opening makes it easy to access coins, cards, and folded bills. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width) C

items.name_en: 🆕Top-tier Original M69797 Beige This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram Empreinte calfskin, highlighting the color contrast of the embossed Monogram pattern. The compact shape features a wide opening for easy access and can be easily slipped into a handbag or pocket.

items.name_en: 🆕【 N40750 】For the Damierlicious special edition, the Victorine wallet is crafted in Damier canvas with a sweet and soft color palette. It brings a fresh and gentle touch to this compact wallet, featuring an envelope-style flap with a gold-engraved clasp. Inside, there are pockets for bills and coins, as well as six card slots. size:12x9.5x1.5cm C

items.name_en: 🆕【 N40748 Blue 】This exclusive edition of the Zippy wallet belongs to the Damierlicious series, where the Damier canvas is reworked in soft tones. This soft color palette brings a fresh and gentle style to this iconic wallet, characterized by its slim profile and full-length zipper. Its thoughtfully designed compartments provide space for cash, cards, and documents. size:19.5x10.5x2.5cm C
